svg.text: Chrome MV3 extension + local Node/Express backend + SQLite (sqlite-vec) + dashboard SPA + workflow automation
BACKEND HTTP API (backend/server.js — Express, CORS, SSE)

g.text: opens Chrome side panel + opens dashboard tab
uploads JD · queries chat · runs workflows
routes all REST + SSE · static-serves /public · in-process EventEmitter broadcasts resume:scored frames · CORS open for chrome-extension://
strict-JSON prompt: { score, breakdown, summary, strengths, concerns, recommendations, candidate, category, roleTitle }
defensive parse — strips ``` fences, finds first {…} block
embed JD · search across all chunks
searchResumes(filters) — SQL on resumes table · category · skills · years · location · score
parseRecruiterQuery(text) — regex NL parser ("React devs with 5+ yrs") → filters object — no AI cost
getAuthUrl · exchangeCode · disconnectGoogle · getAccessToken (lazy refresh, 60s skew)
sendGmail — raw RFC 822 base64url · validIanaTimeZone() guard
smoke-test workflow runner and Google integration without hitting the UI

svg.text: Hard rules: AI keys live ONLY in backend/.env · extension uses PKCE (no client_secret) · PDF/DOCX parsing happens server-side · MV3 service worker (no persistent bg page).
